title: funNLP：中文自然语言处理资源与工具集
title_en: funNLP: Chinese NLP Resources and Tools Collection
summary: 这是一个汇集大量中文自然语言处理（NLP）相关资源与工具的开源仓库，涵盖敏感词检测、命名实体识别、情感分析、知识图谱、预训练模型（如BERT、GPT-2）、语音识别、文本生成、数据增强等众多领域。仓库包含丰富的语料库、数据集、代码实现和实用工具，适合NLP研究者和工程师快速查找和使用。This repository aggregates a vast collection of Chinese NLP resources and tools, covering sensitive word detection, named entity recognition, sentiment analysis, knowledge graphs, pre-trained models (e.g., BERT, GPT-2), speech recognition, text generation, data augmentation, and more. It includes numerous corpora, datasets, code implementations, and utilities, making it a valuable reference for NLP researchers and engineers.
